about.title: One family,
about.paragraph1: Te Blanko is not just a fast-food — it's the home of authentic taste. Founded by a family united by the love for great food, every product is prepared with fresh ingredients and recipes passed down through generations.
about.paragraph2: From our classic burger to our famous qebapa — every dish tells a story of flavor. Come and become part of our family.

cta.title: Hungry?
cta.subtitle: Order now and enjoy the best burger in town. Always fresh, always delicious.
